name: Number → Operation
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) that can be used to perform an operation on a number component (set to minimum or maximum value, decrement, increment), using a generic templatable action call.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the number to update.

config_entries.label: Operation
config_entries.description: What operation to perform on the number component. One of `TO_MIN`, `TO_MAX`, `DECREMENT` or `INCREMENT` (case insensitive). When writing a lambda for this field, then return one of the following enum values: `NUMBER_OP_TO_MIN`, `NUMBER_OP_TO_MAX`, `NUMBER_OP_DECREMENT` or `NUMBER_OP_INCREMENT`.

config_entries.label: Cycle
config_entries.description: Can be used with `DECREMENT` or `INCREMENT` to specify whether or not to wrap around the value when respectively the minimum or maximum value of the number is exceeded.
